zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe於大約1530年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。她於1544年7月20日與George Crooke在英國藍卡爾可洛斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1608年在她的家鄉享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Burstoe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Burston, in Buckinghamshire, Norfolk, and Staffordshire, which have different origins. The Buckinghamshire placename is from an Old English personal name Briddel + Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’; the place in Norfolk is named with Old English byrst ‘rough ground, landslip’ + tūn ‘farmstead’; the Staffordshire placename has the same second element, the first being the Old English personal name Burgwine or Burgwulf.
English: from the Middle English personal name Burstan, Burston (Old English Burgstān, from burg ‘fortress’ + stān ‘stone’).
Americanized form of Jewish   Burstein   (see   Bernstein  ).

variants.name: Burstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Hyman, Ilan, Isaak, Haim, Isadore, Meyer, Yakov, Yisroel, Yonah.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Germanized form of Yiddish burshtin ‘amber’, Polish bursztyn (see Bernstein ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe was born about 1530, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. She married George Crooke on 20 July 1544, in Croston, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1608, in her hometown, at the age of 79.

ko.Bolton le Moors St Peter, Lancashire, En: 영국 랭카실르 볼턴 일 무르스 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe(은)는 대략 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1544년 7월 20일 영국 랭카실르 크로스턴에서 George Crooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1608년 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com George Crooke em 20 de julho de 1544, em Croston, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1608, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe родилась около 1530 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Crooke 20 июля 1544 г. в местности кростон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1608 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.
